BootCurrent: 0003
Timeout: 1 seconds
BootOrder: 0003,0000,0001
Boot0000* Windows Boot Manager	HD(1,GPT,aaaaaaaa-bbbb-cccc-dddd-eeeeeeeeeeee,0x800,0x32000)/File(\EFI\Microsoft\Boot\bootmgfw.efi)
Boot0001* Linux Workspace	HD(1,GPT,aaaaaaaa-bbbb-cccc-dddd-eeeeeeeeeeee,0x800,0x32000)/File(\EFI\ubuntu\shimx64.efi)
Boot0003* Ubuntu	HD(1,GPT,aaaaaaaa-bbbb-cccc-dddd-eeeeeeeeeeee,0x800,0x32000)/File(\EFI\ubuntu\grubx64.efi)
